cases.summary: BaseMethods helpers and utility methods are not part of the shipped capability contract unless a public step annotation exposes them.
cases.reason: The pinned evidence includes helper methods such as random-value generation, string replacement, and download-directory helpers, but they are not directly exposed through step annotations.

cases.summary: Hook-driven initialization and statistics behavior are out of scope for this runtime bundle.
cases.reason: The reviewed source contains hook classes, but this bundle curates only public step semantics and does not claim implicit lifecycle side effects.

cases.summary: The file-content assertion step is only claimed for PDF-backed file variables, not arbitrary text or binary files.
cases.reason: The implementation constructs a PDF parser from the supplied scenario variable before checking text content.

cases.summary: Cross-module integrations are not claimed by this core-only runtime bundle.
cases.reason: Only annotated core-module step classes define shipped capability truth for this bundle; documentation mentions do not expand runtime support.
